We ServeWith Compassion

Achariya Welfare Trust provides food, education, healthcare, and hope to underserved communities across Haryana. Join us in ending hunger and building a brighter India.

Who We Are

Our Mission & Our Vision

From a single district to a nationwide movement — every number represents a life touched.

🏛️

About Us

Founded with a vision to empower every Indian citizen, we've been working tirelessly since 2010 to create lasting social impact across the nation.

Our integrated approach combines grassroots initiatives with strategic partnerships, ensuring sustainable development in education, healthcare, environmental conservation, and economic empowerment.

Learn More About Us →
⭐Trusted

Making a Difference Together

Join our mission to transform lives

🎯

Our Mission

250K+Lives Impacted

Achieving holistic development through integrated activities for the masses — spanning education, health, livelihoods, environment, and social welfare across rural and urban India.

🌟

Our Vision

2030Target Year

Developing positive thinking among people through futuristic strategies — creating a self-reliant, educated, and healthy India where every citizen thrives with dignity.

Join us in our journey to transform India — Be the change you wish to see

What We Do

Our Key Programs

A wide spectrum of welfare activities designed to uplift every section of society — from children to elders, from villages to cities.

Education

Education & Youth

Schools, coaching centers, vocational training, and skill development for youth and women.

Learn more
Health

Health & Wellness

Mobile dispensaries, health camps, yoga, naturopathy, and maternal health support.

Learn more
Empowerment

Women Empowerment

Prevention of atrocities, legal literacy, SHG formation, micro-enterprise development.

Learn more
Environment

Environment

Tree plantation, biodiversity conservation, solar energy, biogas, and eco-awareness.

Learn more
Relief

Disaster Relief

Rapid response, relief distribution, rehabilitation, and community preparedness programs.

Learn more
Rural

Rural Development

Agro-processing, livelihood, water purification, IT centers at village to state level.

Learn more
View All Activities

2023

Scholarship Drive

1,200 students

Full scholarships covering tuition, books, and uniforms for underprivileged students.

Mobile Health Camps

8,000+ patients

Free medical check-ups and medicines in 40+ remote villages.

2024

Women SHG Network

₹45L+ income

Empowering 320 women through self-help groups and micro-loans.

Read story
2024

Green Mission

50,000 trees

Planting drive across 60 villages with community participation.

Testimonials

What people say

Real stories from our community

"My daughter got a full scholarship through Achariya Trust. Today she is studying engineering at a top college — a dream we never thought possible."

Ramesh Kumar Sharma

"The trust helped me start my own tailoring business. I now earn ₹8,000 per month and support my family independently — I feel truly empowered."

Sunita Devi

"I have volunteered for 3 years with Achariya Trust. Their rural healthcare reach is truly impressive — the dedication of the on-ground team is remarkable."

Dr. Arvind Mehta

"Transparency and reporting from Achariya Trust is excellent. As a CSR partner, we always know exactly where our contributions go and the impact they create."

Priya Agarwal
Our Goals

Our Future Goals

Bold, measurable targets that drive every program, partnership, and rupee we raise. Join us in making these ambitious goals a reality.

Progress Towards Our Vision

Working towards transforming 1,00,000 lives

15%Completed

Current

15,000+ Lives

Next Phase

50,000 Lives

Future Goal

1,00,000 Lives

01

1 Lakh Lives Transformed

Expanding programs to reach 1,00,000 beneficiaries across Haryana and neighboring states.

CurrentTarget
15,000+1,00,000

In Progress

02

500 Villages Coverage

Deploying mobile units and grassroot teams to cover 500+ villages with education, health, and livelihood programs.

CurrentTarget
100+500

In Progress

03

Zero Child Drop-out

Working with schools and families to ensure every enrolled child completes at least 10th standard education.

CurrentTarget
94%100%

In Progress

04

50 Corporate Partners

Building CSR partnerships with 50 companies to create sustainable, long-term funding for rural development.

CurrentTarget
1250

In Progress

Help Us Achieve These Goals

Your support brings us closer to every milestone. Together, we can transform more lives.

Your Trust Matters

We are committed to complete transparency in all our operations. Our financial records, annual reports, and impact assessments are available for public review.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about donations, volunteering, partnerships, and our work.

You can donate directly through our website via PayU (UPI, Cards, Net Banking), bank transfer, or UPI ID "achariyatrust@upi". All donations are eligible for 80G tax exemption.
Yes, Achariya Welfare Trust is registered under 80G & 12A of the Income Tax Act. All donations made to us are eligible for 50% tax exemption. You will receive a 80G receipt within 7 working days.
You can volunteer by filling out the volunteer form on our website or emailing us at volunteer@achariyatrust.org. We welcome doctors, teachers, social workers, and students for various programs.
We currently operate in 6+ districts of Haryana including Hisar, Fatehabad, Jind, Bhiwani, Sirsa, and Rohtak. We are expanding to neighboring states gradually.
We welcome CSR partnerships. Companies can partner with us for education scholarships, health camps, women empowerment programs, or environmental initiatives. Contact us at csr@achariyatrust.org.
We maintain 100% transparency. 85% of funds go directly to programs, 10% to administration, and 5% to fundraising. Annual reports and audited financials are available on our website.
Yes! You can sponsor a child's complete education for ₹10,000 per year. This covers tuition, books, uniform, and midday meals. You will receive regular progress updates about your sponsored child.
After successful donation, you will receive an instant receipt via email. For bank transfers, email your transaction screenshot to accounts@achariyatrust.org and you will receive the 80G certificate within 7 days.
24/7 Support Available

Still Have Questions?

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our friendly team is here to help you.

February 10, 2024 6 min read
#Women Empowerment#SHG#Livelihood
S

Privacy PolicyTerms & ConditionsRefund PolicySitemap

Achariya Welfare Trust is registered under the Indian Trusts Act, 1882. Donations are eligible for 50% tax exemption under Section 80G of Income Tax Act.
